original: and your companion
! You
and Dane
are
able to dodge the strike.
struck by the sweeping spear!
The nyrean queen sneers, twirling the haft around herself is a buzzing ring that cuts the air.
comes crashing down at your head.\nYou barely sidestep it!
comes crashing down on your head, hard.
You are stunned!
A moment later and she’s dancing around you, slashing at you with the sharp end.
You have to admit, the idea is uncomfortably tempting...
Thank the stars for your airtight armor!
You cough as the mist billows out, making your eyes water and flesh tingle. You are surrounded by a cloud of lust-drug!
, but your goggles protect your eyes.
, but to little effect.
! You’re blinded!
You shrug off the nyrea’s advances.

Shit! You try and push forward to stop [rival.himHer], but the damn bug-queen almost spears you through the chest for your troubles. She forces you back with a flurry of strikes, refusing to let you anywhere near her throne... even as [rival.name] plants [rival.hisHer] hand on the scanner and activates it. DAMMIT!
You barely dodge aside!
“Come now,” she purrs, stroking the shaft. “Surrender now, and I’ll keep you as a favored pet. You’ve earned that much... perhaps I’ll even let you carry a clutch of my spawn.”
Dane seems oddly taken with the queen...
Dane sneers at the queen’s offer, clearly not ready to be her next bottom bitch.
You shrug off the nyrea’s advances.
Getting railed by a dozen tentacle cocks... now that’s something new!
You dodge it, and the vial shatters harmlessly against the stone wall.
The vial shatters against your chest, bursting into a cloud of pink mist.

You cousin flashes you a shit-eating grin as the probe’s coordinates download onto [rival.hisHer] Codex. [rival.name] "+{var0}.mf("gives you a sarcastic salute","blows you an over-acted kiss")+" before leaping off the back of the throne and scampering off. Looks like you’re getting left in the dust again...
